chapter_title.ar: باب عِدَّةِ أُمَّهَاتِ الْأَوْلَادِ وَ الرَّجُلِ يُعْتِقُ إِحْدَاهُنَّ أَوْ يَمُوتُ عَنْهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 78 – Waiting period of the mothers of the children, and the man who emancipates one of them, or he dies from her

text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الرَّجُلُ تَكُونُ عِنْدَهُ السُّرِّيَّةُ لَهُ وَ قَدْ وَلَدَتْ مِنْهُ وَ قَدْ مَاتَ وَلَدُهَا ثُمَّ يُعْتِقُهَا قَالَ لَا يَحِلُّ لَهَا أَنْ تَتَزَوَّجَ حَتَّى تَنْقَضِيَ عِدَّتُهَا ثَلَاثَةُ أَشْهُرٍ .

en.hubeali: Ibn Mahboub, from Sa’dan Bin Muslim, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The man happens to have a concubine of his with him, and she had given birth from him, and her child had died. Then he emancipated her’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is not Permissible for her that he marries until she fulfills her waiting period of three months’.
